title: Runtime Agent Role Spec
purpose: Define the LLM-driven runtime role for each harness agent node.
responsibilities: Reason from task instance and upstream artifacts before selecting an action.
Select capabilities only when they are needed and allowed by policy.
Produce a role-specific node output artifact after execution.
Provide handoff context for downstream agents.
prohibitions: Do not bypass LLM reasoning with a direct tool call.
Do not use GitHub search for content or information lookup.
Do not emit generic metadata as the node's main artifact content.
